name: Shattuck Labs, Inc.
summary: Overview We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company pioneering the development of potentially first-in-class monoclonal and bispecific Death Receptor 3 (DR3) blocking antibodies for the treatment of patients with inflammatory and immune-mediated diseases.
